ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country (e.g., AFG for Afghanistan) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion to which the country belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "series_code" TEXT /* Code for the series (e.g., NY.GDP.PCAP.KD for GDP per capita) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the series */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the series data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the data */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection the data belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the year record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collection was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the collection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_series" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id", "series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_data" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id", "data_id")
)
